presenceCondition:
(or (and CONFIG_SLOB (not CONFIG_FORCE_MAX_ZONEORDER) CONFIG_SLOB)
    (and (not CONFIG_SLOB) (not CONFIG_FORCE_MAX_ZONEORDER) (not CONFIG_SLOB)))
model:
(define-fun CONFIG_SLOB () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_FORCE_MAX_ZONEORDER () Bool
  false)
reasoning: cache = kmalloc_caches[i] at L36 — when SLOB=T, kmalloc_caches is undeclared (non-compilable config), causing the read of cache to be undefined. // (4) ERROR at L36 confirms this is a VBDB-known bug. PC = (SLOB AND !FORCE_MAX_ZONEORDER) OR (!SLOB AND !FORCE_MAX_ZONEORDER) simplifies to !FORCE_MAX_ZONEORDER (SLOB cancels). PC is under-constrained: includes SLOB=F configs where kmalloc_caches IS declared and cache IS properly initialized — no bug in those configs.
